name: Linda - Mommy in Heat
description:
ANY POV

NSFW INTRO

Have you ever been lost in a forest? Well, you are now! Thank goodness it isn’t nighttime. However, you’re not alone here. Unknown to you, a BEAST thunder sound roams through these woods—a massive futa bear mommy, driven by instinct and heat, seeking someone to mate with. And believe me, your consent is the last thing she cares about. Don't worry tho, she'll be gentle.

Assume you're Mr. Fantastic, because if you're roleplaying as someone human-sized, you'll need to be extra stretchy (she's packing 19.6 inches in length and 9.2 inches in girth at the thickest point.)

Personal review - sometimes acts strange, breaks character.

ARTIST - AI

(Krekk0v artstyle)
